title: FiveM Staff Application (Allowlist)
description: An application for staff on the allowlist server. Requires good standing, active Discord participation, and active participation on the allowlist FiveM Server. Must have extensive staff or moderation experience in content creation, gaming or RP space.

questions.label: Have you ever been banned, on this server or others at any time and why?
questions.hint: Be truthful, we will check. Name the servers and the rule breaks.

questions.label: What work do you want to do as staff?
questions.hint: Please Select one or all.

questions.label: Experience?
questions.hint: Please mention RP community management, GTA Administration, customer support, Forum/Discord moderation.

questions.label: Why do you want to be Pulse RP staff?
questions.hint: Explain in detail your motivations and the value you bring.

questions.label: How important is 'impartiality' in reports?
questions.hint: Explain in your own words.

questions.label: What is your availability?
questions.hint: How many hours are you EU/AU/NA? What times exactly are you around in your time zone.

questions.label: Who do you play on our server?
questions.hint: Tell us about all the characters you play on our servers. Are they in a Gov job? A gang? Or do they simply live the civilian lifestyle?

questions.label: Acknowledgement
questions.hint: Do you acknowledge that upon acceptance you may be required to sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement and legally binding contract?

title: FiveM Priority Allowlist Application
description: This is a Paid Priority Review Allowlist application, that requires you to purchase a Gold subscription or higher on our web store. Permits one application submission. Before submitting, provide multiple clips showcasing your roleplay abilities.
